posts.author: TomFri (Tom Fridman)
posts.cookedHtml:
1_1 all pltaforms Community post - Meetapp (10)2160×2160 117 KB

Hi Community!

Mark your calendars for the end of this month as we have an exciting event lined up just for you.

Join us for a MeetApp community session dedicated to the Marketplace and Developers Framework Roadmap.

In this session, you will have the opportunity to hear from not just one, but four of our product managers who will present our grand plans and upcoming releases.
Curious about what the near future holds for the marketplace?

We invite you to join us and discover the exciting developments in store for our platform.
Don’t miss out on this exclusive event!
Register here
See you there!

posts.author: TomFri (Tom Fridman)
posts.cookedHtml: We are meeting tomorrow! Don’t forget to register!
